ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the brand belongs to */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the campaign belongs to */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad format (e.g., logo flash, squeezeback) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the ad format */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of ad format (e.g., video, image, audio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Coverage area of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the program is broadcasted */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad schedule */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the ad belongs to */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ad format */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the ad is scheduled */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program where the ad is scheduled */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the ad is scheduled to air */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Time when the ad is scheduled to air */,
  "ad_length" TEXT /* Length of the ad */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the ad schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_schedules_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_schedules_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES ad_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_schedules_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad flight */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ad schedule */,
  "actual_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the ad was aired */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time when the ad was aired */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the ad flight */,
  "broadcast_status" TEXT /* Status of the ad broadcast (e.g., aired, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_flights_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES ad_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ad flight */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Reach of the ad */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement rate */,
  "CTR" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) */,
  "CPM" REAL /* Cost per thousand impressions (CPM) */,
  "CPC" REAL /* Cost per click (CPC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES ad_flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., advertiser, media planner, admin) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad schedule being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., updated schedule, viewed performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES ad_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "ad_schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad schedule the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_ad_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_schedule_id") REFERENCES ad_schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the language is primarily spoken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation record */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad schedule the translation is for */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the translation is in */,
  "ad_content" TEXT /* Ad content in the specified language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_translations_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES ad_schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_translations_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)
